pr.title: Record: 0.3212 BPB — Complementary N-gram 65K + Int5 GPTQ + LoRA TTT

output.summary: Combines complementary training with entropy-adaptive order-9 n-gram caching on 65K chunks plus LoRA TTT and full Hessian GPTQ int5.
techniques: - Complementary training with per-order entropy multipliers and 65K-token n-gram cache refresh
- LoRA TTT (rank 8, Polyak-decayed adaptation) for chunk-wise updates with backward-looking scoring
- Full Hessian GPTQ int5 with Soft-Round QAT and Cholesky error correction
